nodes.description: UE is in state 5GMM-DEREGISTERED.
UE has sent a REGISTRATION REQUEST and is waiting for a response (Timer T3510 running).
UE has received REGISTRATION ACCEPT requiring acknowledgement and is preparing to send REGISTRATION COMPLETE.
UE is in state 5GMM-REGISTERED with 5GS update status 5U1 UPDATED.
UE's registration attempt was rejected by the network or failed due to internal errors/timeouts.
AMF is idle with respect to the UE's registration procedure.
AMF has received the REGISTRATION REQUEST and is processing it.
AMF has sent REGISTRATION ACCEPT requiring acknowledgement and is waiting for REGISTRATION COMPLETE (Timer T3550 running).
AMF considers the UE to be in state 5GMM-REGISTERED.
REGISTRATION REQUEST message is sent by UE or received by AMF.
REGISTRATION ACCEPT message requiring REGISTRATION COMPLETE is sent by AMF or received by UE.
REGISTRATION ACCEPT message not requiring REGISTRATION COMPLETE is sent by AMF or received by UE.
REGISTRATION REJECT message is sent by AMF or received by UE.
REGISTRATION COMPLETE message is sent by UE or received by AMF.
UE's timer T3510 expires and registration attempt counter is less than 5.
UE's timer T3510 expires and registration attempt counter is equal to 5.
AMF's timer T3550 expires (1st to 4th time).
AMF's timer T3550 expires for the 5th time.
Lower layer failure or NAS signalling connection release at UE side.
Lower layer failure at AMF side while waiting for REGISTRATION COMPLETE.
UE's timer T3511 expires (used for retry delay after failure).
UE's timer T3502 expires (started after max registration attempts).
UE's back-off timer T3346 expires (started after rejection due to congestion).
AMF is executing common procedures like identification, authentication, security mode control.
REGISTRATION REJECT received with a cause requiring PLMN/SNPN selection.

edges.description: Triggered when the UE in state 5GMM-DEREGISTERED initiates the initial registration procedure by sending a REGISTRATION REQUEST message.
edges.conditions: UE needs to perform initial registration for 5GS services, emergency services, SMS over NAS, mobility from GERAN/UTRAN, onboarding in SNPN, disaster roaming, or resuming normal services after unavailability (as specified in 5.5.1.2.2).

edges.description: UE transitions to attempting registration after sending the REGISTRATION REQUEST message and starting timer T3510.
edges.conditions: UE sends REGISTRATION REQUEST message and starts timer T3510. Timers T3502 and T3511 are stopped if running (5.5.1.2.2).

edges.description: Triggered when the AMF receives a REGISTRATION REQUEST message from the UE.
edges.conditions: AMF is in an idle state regarding this UE's registration.

edges.description: AMF transitions to processing the initial registration upon receiving the REGISTRATION REQUEST message.
edges.conditions: AMF receives REGISTRATION REQUEST message (5.5.1.2.2).

edges.description: AMF proceeds to execute common procedures (e.g., identification, authentication, security) as part of processing the registration request.
edges.conditions: Execution depends on information received in the REGISTRATION REQUEST message and network policy (5.5.1.2.3).

edges.description: Triggered when the AMF accepts the registration and sends a REGISTRATION ACCEPT message that requires a REGISTRATION COMPLETE acknowledgement from the UE.
edges.conditions: Initial registration accepted (5.5.1.2.4), and REGISTRATION ACCEPT includes specific IEs requiring acknowledgement (e.g., 5G-GUTI reallocation, SOR container, Operator-defined access category definitions, Extended emergency number list, CAG information list, Extended CAG information list, Negotiated PEIPS assistance information (if RCMAP supported), UE radio capability ID/deletion indication (if RACS supported), Truncated 5G-S-TMSI configuration, service-level-AA pending indication, Network slicing subscription change indication, new Configured NSSAI, new NSSRG information, new Alternative NSSAI, new S-NSSAI location validity information, new S-NSSAI time validity information, new On-demand NSSAI, or NSAG information (if RCMAN supported)) (5.5.1.2.4).

edges.description: AMF transitions to waiting for REGISTRATION COMPLETE after sending REGISTRATION ACCEPT (requiring completion) and starting timer T3550.
edges.conditions: AMF sends REGISTRATION ACCEPT requiring completion and starts timer T3550 (5.5.1.2.4).

edges.description: Triggered when the AMF accepts the registration and sends a REGISTRATION ACCEPT message that does not require a REGISTRATION COMPLETE acknowledgement.
edges.conditions: Initial registration accepted (5.5.1.2.4), and REGISTRATION ACCEPT does not include any IEs requiring acknowledgement (see conditions for E_REGISTRATION_ACCEPT_ReqComplete trigger).

edges.description: AMF transitions to registered state after sending REGISTRATION ACCEPT (not requiring completion).
edges.conditions: AMF sends REGISTRATION ACCEPT not requiring completion (5.5.1.2.4).

edges.description: Triggered when the AMF rejects the initial registration request by sending a REGISTRATION REJECT message.
edges.conditions: Registration cannot be accepted by the network due to various reasons specified in 5.5.1.2.5 (e.g., congestion, illegal UE, PLMN not allowed, etc.).

edges.description: AMF transitions back to idle after sending REGISTRATION REJECT.
edges.conditions: AMF sends REGISTRATION REJECT message (5.5.1.2.5).

edges.description: Triggered when the UE receives a REGISTRATION ACCEPT message that requires a REGISTRATION COMPLETE acknowledgement.
edges.conditions: UE receives REGISTRATION ACCEPT containing specific IEs requiring acknowledgement (see conditions for AMF sending E_REGISTRATION_ACCEPT_ReqComplete) (5.5.1.2.4).

edges.description: UE transitions to sending REGISTRATION COMPLETE after receiving REGISTRATION ACCEPT (requiring completion).
edges.conditions: UE receives REGISTRATION ACCEPT requiring completion. UE stops timer T3510 (implicitly by receiving ACCEPT/REJECT) and prepares to send REGISTRATION COMPLETE (5.5.1.2.4).

edges.description: Triggered when the UE receives a REGISTRATION ACCEPT message that does not require a REGISTRATION COMPLETE acknowledgement.
edges.conditions: UE receives REGISTRATION ACCEPT not containing IEs requiring acknowledgement (5.5.1.2.4).

edges.description: UE transitions to registered state after receiving REGISTRATION ACCEPT (not requiring completion).
edges.conditions: UE receives REGISTRATION ACCEPT not requiring completion. UE stops timer T3510 (implicitly), resets registration attempt counter, enters state 5GMM-REGISTERED, and sets 5GS update status to 5U1 UPDATED (5.5.1.2.4).

edges.description: Triggered when the UE receives a REGISTRATION REJECT message from the AMF.
edges.conditions: UE receives REGISTRATION REJECT message (5.5.1.2.5).

edges.description: UE transitions to a rejected state after receiving REGISTRATION REJECT. Specific actions and subsequent state depend on the 5GMM cause value.
edges.conditions: UE receives REGISTRATION REJECT message. UE stops timer T3510 (implicitly). UE follows procedures based on the 5GMM cause value (5.5.1.2.5).

edges.description: Triggered when the UE sends the REGISTRATION COMPLETE message.
edges.conditions: UE has received REGISTRATION ACCEPT requiring completion and sends the REGISTRATION COMPLETE message (5.5.1.2.4).

edges.description: UE transitions to registered state after successfully sending REGISTRATION COMPLETE.
edges.conditions: UE sends REGISTRATION COMPLETE message. UE is already in 5GMM-REGISTERED state (transitioned upon receiving ACCEPT) (5.5.1.2.4).

edges.description: Triggered when the AMF receives the REGISTRATION COMPLETE message from the UE.
edges.conditions: AMF is in state AMF_Waiting_Registration_Complete (T3550 running) and receives REGISTRATION COMPLETE (5.5.1.2.4).

edges.description: AMF transitions to registered state after receiving REGISTRATION COMPLETE.
edges.conditions: AMF receives REGISTRATION COMPLETE message. AMF stops timer T3550 and changes state to 5GMM-REGISTERED (5.5.1.2.4).

edges.description: Triggered when timer T3510 expires and the registration attempt counter is less than 5.
edges.conditions: Timer T3510 expires, registration attempt counter < 5 (5.5.1.2.7 case c).

edges.description: UE increments the registration attempt counter and re-initiates the registration procedure after T3510 timeout (potentially after T3511 expiry).
edges.conditions: Registration attempt counter incremented (< 5), registration still required. UE starts T3511, and restarts the procedure upon T3511 expiry (5.5.1.2.7 case c).

edges.description: Triggered when timer T3510 expires and the registration attempt counter reaches 5.
edges.conditions: Timer T3510 expires, registration attempt counter = 5 (5.5.1.2.7 case c).

edges.description: UE considers registration failed after maximum T3510 timeouts/retries.
edges.conditions: Registration attempt counter reached 5 after T3510 expiry. UE deletes TAI list, last visited registered TAI, potentially 5G-GUTI/ngKSI, starts T3502 (if > 0), sets 5GS update status to 5U2 NOT UPDATED, and enters 5GMM-DEREGISTERED.ATTEMPTING-REGISTRATION or PLMN-SEARCH (5.5.1.2.7 case c).

edges.description: Triggered by lower layer failure or NAS signalling connection release before receiving REGISTRATION ACCEPT or REGISTRATION REJECT.
edges.conditions: Lower layer failure or connection release occurs (5.5.1.2.7 case e).

edges.description: UE aborts registration due to lower layer failure and proceeds based on the registration attempt counter.
edges.conditions: Lower layer failure occurred. UE stops T3510, increments attempt counter, and follows retry/max retry logic (5.5.1.2.7 case e).

edges.description: Triggered by lower layer failure during transmission of REGISTRATION COMPLETE.
edges.conditions: Lower layer indicates transmission failure for REGISTRATION COMPLETE message (5.5.1.2.7 case i or j).

edges.description: Triggered when timer T3550 expires at the AMF (1st to 4th time).
edges.conditions: Timer T3550 expires, retransmission count < 5 (5.5.1.2.8 case c).

edges.description: AMF retransmits REGISTRATION ACCEPT and restarts T3550, remaining in the waiting state.
edges.conditions: T3550 expired (1st to 4th time). AMF retransmits REGISTRATION ACCEPT and restarts T3550 (5.5.1.2.8 case c).

edges.description: Triggered on the fifth expiry of timer T3550 at the AMF.
edges.conditions: Timer T3550 expires for the 5th time (5.5.1.2.8 case c).

edges.description: AMF aborts waiting and considers the UE registered after maximum T3550 timeouts.
edges.conditions: 5th expiry of T3550. AMF aborts procedure and enters 5GMM-REGISTERED state (5.5.1.2.8 case c).

edges.description: Triggered by lower layer failure at the AMF while waiting for REGISTRATION COMPLETE.
edges.conditions: Lower layer failure occurs while T3550 is running (5.5.1.2.8 case a).

edges.description: AMF aborts waiting due to lower layer failure and considers the UE registered.
edges.conditions: Lower layer failure occurred while T3550 was running. AMF aborts procedure and enters 5GMM-REGISTERED state (5.5.1.2.8 case a).

edges.description: Triggered when back-off timer T3346 expires.
edges.conditions: Timer T3346 expires. T3346 was started upon receiving REGISTRATION REJECT with 5GMM cause #22 'congestion' (5.5.1.2.5).

edges.description: UE re-attempts initial registration after T3346 expires, if registration is still needed.
edges.conditions: Timer T3346 expired or stopped, and initial registration is still required (5.5.1.2.5, 5.5.1.2.7 case a).

edges.description: Triggered after receiving a REGISTRATION REJECT with specific causes that require the UE to perform PLMN/SNPN selection.
edges.conditions: Receiving REGISTRATION REJECT with 5GMM cause #3, #6, #7, #11, #13, #36, #62 (partly), #73, #74, #75, #76 (partly), #78, #80 (5.5.1.2.5).

edges.description: UE enters a deregistered state (specifically 5GMM-DEREGISTERED.PLMN-SEARCH) requiring PLMN/SNPN selection based on the rejection cause.
edges.conditions: Specific rejection cause received (see conditions for E_REJECT_CAUSE_PLMN_SELECTION trigger). UE performs PLMN/SNPN selection according to 3GPP TS 23.122 (5.5.1.2.5).

edges.description: Triggered when timer T3502 expires.
edges.conditions: Timer T3502 expires. T3502 is started after the registration attempt counter reaches 5 due to repeated failures (e.g., T3510 expiry, lower layer failure) (5.5.1.2.7 case c).
